# Therapy at Home

> Therapy at Home (therapyathome.in) is a home-based physiotherapy and Ayurveda service in Coimbatore and Theni, Tamil Nadu, India. We specialize in neck and back pain relief through certified therapists who visit patients at their homes.

##  Services

- [Physiotherapy at Home](/services#physiotherapy): Certified physiotherapists providing pain relief and rehabilitation at your doorstep
- [Abhyanga Ayurvedic Massage](/services#abhyanga): Traditional full-body Ayurvedic oil massage for pain relief and relaxation
- [Portable Steam Bath](/services#steam): Portable steam therapy session delivered at home for muscle relief and detox
- [Plantain Leaf Bath](/services#plantain): Signature Ayurvedic treatment using plantain leaves for therapeutic healing

## About

- [About Us](/about): Learn about Therapy at Home, our approach, and our trained therapists
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions about our home visit services, pricing, and coverage areas

## Contact & Booking

- [Book a Session](/contact): Schedule a home visit in Coimbatore & Theni
- [Home](/)): Overview of all services and patient testimonials

## Coverage Areas

We serve patients across Coimbatore and Theni, Tamil Nadu. Sessions are conducted at the patient's home — no clinic visit required.
